title: anthoxanthum ecklonii subsp. natalense
intro: Anthoxanthum ecklonii subsp. natalense, also known as Natalo Veldgrass, is a subspecies of grass native to the grasslands of South Africa. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anthoxanthum ecklonii subsp. natalense include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to make a medicinal drink, although its preparation and usage should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
